endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/microsoft.insights/guestDiagnosticSettings
endpoints.description: Get a list of all guest diagnostic settings in a subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/microsoft.insights/guestDiagnosticSettings
endpoints.description: Get a list of all guest diagnostic settings in a resource group.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/microsoft.insights/guestDiagnosticSettings/{diagnosticSettingsName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{DIAGNOSTICSETTINGSNAME}} with a real diagnosticsettingsname.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/microsoft.insights/guestDiagnosticSettings/{diagnosticSettingsName}
endpoints.description: Creates or updates guest diagnostics settings.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{DIAGNOSTICSETTINGSNAME}} with a real diagnosticsettingsname.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/microsoft.insights/guestDiagnosticSettings/{diagnosticSettingsName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{DIAGNOSTICSETTINGSNAME}} with a real diagnosticsettingsname.

endpoints.name: PATCH /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/microsoft.insights/guestDiagnosticSettings/{diagnosticSettingsName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{DIAGNOSTICSETTINGSNAME}} with a real diagnosticsettingsname.
